title: Airport Assistance
opening: Good morning, welcome to Terminal 5. How may I assist you today?

t1_greeting.prompt: Good morning, welcome to Terminal 5. How may I assist you today?
t1_greeting.promptTranslation: Good morning, welcome to Terminal 5. How may I assist you today? — Good morning, welcome to Terminal 5. How may I assist you today?

t2_checkin.prompt: Certainly. Could I trouble you for your passport and booking reference, please?
t2_checkin.promptTranslation: Certainly. Could I trouble you for your passport and booking reference, please? — Certainly. Could I trouble you for your passport and booking reference, please?

t2_flight.prompt: Understood. Could you tell me your flight number or destination, so I can pull up the latest information?
t2_flight.promptTranslation: Understood. Could you tell me your flight number or destination, so I can pull up the latest information? — Understood. Could you tell me your flight number or destination, so I can pull up the latest information?

t2_lost.prompt: I'm truly sorry to hear that. Could you give me your flight details and a brief description of your bag so we can initiate a report?
t2_lost.promptTranslation: I'm truly sorry to hear that. Could you give me your flight details and a brief description of your bag so we can initiate a report?

t3_boardingpass.prompt: Excellent. Your boarding pass has been issued. Are you checking in any luggage, or just proceeding with carry-on?
t3_boardingpass.promptTranslation: Excellent. Your boarding pass has been issued. Are you checking in any luggage, or just proceeding with carry-on?

t3_flightinfo_ack.prompt: Understood. For Flight BA249 to São Paulo, it's scheduled for a timely departure from Gate B32. Boarding will commence at 14:30. Is there anything else I can clarify?
t3_flightinfo_ack.promptTranslation: Understood. For Flight BA249 to São Paulo, it's scheduled for a timely departure from Gate B32. Boarding will commence at 14:30. Is there anything else I can clarify?

t3_lost_ack.prompt: Of course. You'll need to head to the Baggage Services office. It's located on the Arrivals level, just after you clear customs. They're equipped to handle lost and found reports there.
t3_lost_ack.promptTranslation: Of course. You'll need to head to the Baggage Services office. It's located on the Arrivals level, just after you clear customs. They're equipped to handle lost and found reports there.

t-repeat.prompt: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase or speak a little clearer?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please rephrase or speak a little clearer?

t-end.prompt: You're all set then. Have a pleasant journey and thank you for flying with us!
t-end.promptTranslation: You're all set then. Have a pleasant journey and thank you for flying with us!
